walkthroughs.title: Welcome to Flow-State!
walkthroughs.description: Set up and customize Flow-State to protect yourself from burnout.

steps.title: Monitor Your Flow State
steps.description:
The Status Bar at the bottom right is the heart of this extension. It actively monitors your session . 

**Hover over it** at any time to reveal detailed session stats, including the **Code Complexity** score of your current file!

steps.title: Prevent Mental Fatigue
steps.description: Flow-State tracks your typing habits—like heavy reading, massive deletions, or pasting large AI snippets—to warn you when your cognitive load is getting too high.

steps.title: Choose Your Protections
steps.description: Customize Flow-State to your liking. You can turn individual tracking features on or off.

flow-state.enableCognitiveLoadTracker.description: Master Switch: Enable the entire Developer Cognitive Load tracker (Complexity, Read/Write, Add/Delete).

flow-state.enableCodeComplexity.description: Enable Code Complexity tracking within Developer Cognitive Load tracker.

flow-state.enableReadWriteTracking.description: Enable Read-Write tracking (detects if you are stuck reading for a long time) within Developer Cognitive Load tracker.

flow-state.enableAddDeleteTracking.description: Enable Add-Delete ratio tracking (detects if you are heavily deleting code) within Developer Cognitive Load tracker.

flow-state.readWriteTimeThresholdSeconds.description: Time in seconds without typing before triggering a 'Heavy Reading' warning within Developer Cognitive Load tracker.

flow-state.addDeleteRatioThreshold.description: If the ratio of added to deleted characters falls below this value (with high deletion count), trigger a 'Stuck' warning within Developer Cognitive Load tracker.

flow-state.enableLargeInsertionTracking.description: Enable tracking for massive text insertions (like pasting AI-generated code) within Developer Cognitive Load tracker.

flow-state.largeInsertionThresholdChars.description: The number of characters inserted at once that triggers a 'High Review Load' warning within Developer Cognitive Load tracker.

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
